name: Novus Glass

red_flags.summary: No Item 19 financial performance representation disclosed.

validation_questions: Confirm current auditor and most recent audit opinion.

internal_unresolveds.reason: 2023 contraction: -23 units (18 non-renewals, especially MN -14). Root cause not disclosed.
11 franchisees excluded from Item 19 for incomplete reporting — potential survivorship/reporting bias.
Marketing Fund not audited. Only report available on request.
Vehicle lease subordination: if Mondofix USA master lease terminates, all franchisee subleases terminate automatically.
Materially different terms at renewal: franchisee must sign then-current agreement which may differ substantially.
AI restriction clause in Item 14: blanket prohibition on using confidential info with AI tools.
Royalty revenue declined 5.5% ($3.32M to $3.13M) despite net unit growth — possible declining per-unit economics.
Royalty revenue declined 5.5% ($3.32M to $3.13M) despite net unit growth (+3). Likely timing/composition effects.
Bootstrap item_map placed Items 11 and 17 at wrong pages (82 and 86 vs actual 42 and 56)
